title: Device Home Screen - Release Notes button opens modal with Release Notes
scenario: Release Notes modal displays and dismisses correctly when tapping OK on Device Home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. On the Home screen, locate and tap the "Release Notes" button.
4. Observe that a modal appears displaying the release notes for the connected device.
5. Tap the "OK" button within the modal.
expected: The modal closes and the user is returned to the Device Home screen.
